title: Webinar Series Part-2 Future Underwater Wireless Communication Techniques and
subtitle: An insightful webinar focusing on emerging underwater communication technologies, this session explored the challenges and innovations in wireless systems beneath the ocean. It encouraged research-driven thinking and highlighted the future scope of underwater connectivity.
description:
Title of the event: Webinar, Underwater Wireless Communications 
 Objective: The objective of this event was to emphasize the importance and growing scope of underwater wireless technology in today’s world. The webinar aimed to equip students and academicians with knowledge to explore research opportunities and develop innovations in the field of wireless communication. It began with an introduction to underwater communication, discussing its fundamentals and the requirements needed to make such systems possible. Dr. Prashant then further elaborated on the topic with detailed insights.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Promote awareness of emerging communication technologies.
Fundamentals and requirements of underwater communication
